title: Hot Pink Polka Dot Paper Treat Boxes (20cm x 15cm) Pack of 8 - Stylish Party Favor Packaging for Celebrations & Events
features: VIBRANT & STYLISH DESIGN: Give your party favors a pop of color with our hot pink polka dot paper treat boxes, perfect for adding fun and flair to any celebration or event.
PACK OF 8 BOXES: Measuring 20cm x 15cm, these spacious treat boxes are perfect for a variety of goodies, gifts, or snacks for your guests.
EYE-CATCHING POLKA DOT PATTERN: Stand out from the crowd with our striking hot pink polka dot design, guaranteed to make an impression and leave your guests impressed.
ECO-FRIENDLY & DURABLE PAPER MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality, sturdy paper, our treat boxes offer a guilt-free party favor option, while ensuring your goodies stay safe and secure.

ALL-PURPOSE PARTY PACKAGING: Our hot pink paper treat boxes are ideal for birthday bashes, baby showers, bridal parties, holiday festivities, and so much more! Make your next event unforgettable with these fashionable and functional favor boxes.
